headline: Man Creates 'Passive Aggressive Greeting Card Generator' That Writes Complaints As Well Wishes
summary: The 'Backhanded Blessings' app creates cards like 'Happy Birthday, you're not as old as you look' and 'Congratulations on the promotion, lucky guess.'
fullBody: Greeting card revolutionary Steve Sarcasm has created an app called 'Backhanded Blessings' that generates passive-aggressive greeting cards for any occasion. The app creates cards like 'Happy Birthday, you're not as old as you look' for someone you don't like, 'Congratulations on the promotion, lucky guess' for a coworker you resent, and 'Thinking of you during this difficult time, I guess' for someone going through a divorce. One user said, 'I sent a Happy Housewarming card that said Welcome to your new place, it's nice... for the price range and they still haven't invited me over, which was the goal.' The app has been downloaded 3 million times, primarily by people who 'want to send something nice but can't resist being petty.' A premium version offers 'full-frontal insults' disguised as encouragement.
imagePrompt: Greeting card with text saying YOU'RE NOT LOOKING BAD FOR YOUR AGE, person looking smug while mailing it, comic illustration, flat design, purple and pink colors
